mailPositive: Please enter the code you received at %VAR% (Check the spam folder if you do not receive a code).
mailFailedDescription:
We couldn't send the verification email to:
`%VAR%`

**Possible reasons:**
• The email address doesn't exist
• The email server rejected the message
• There's a temporary delivery issue

Please double-check your email address and try again.
mailInvalid: Please enter only valid email addresses
mailBlacklistedDescription:
The email address you entered has been blocked by the server administrator.

This could be because:
• The email domain is not allowed
• The specific email has been banned

If you believe this is an error, please contact a server administrator.
mailTimeoutDescription:
You're sending emails too quickly.

Please wait **%VAR% seconds** before requesting another verification code.

This limit helps prevent spam and ensures reliable email delivery.
invalidPermissions: You are not allowed to execute this command!
commandFailed: There was an error while executing this command!
userRetry: An error occurred. Please remove and add the reaction to try again.
userBotError: Bot not properly configured. Please contact admin!
userEnterEmail: Please enter your email address to verify %VAR%.
userCantFindRole: Cant find roles. Please contact the admin! Help: Ensure that the name is still the same and that the bot role is higher in the serversettings role menu then the verified and unverified role.
emailText:
Hello,

This is an automated confirmation message for the server:

%VAR%

Your code:

%VAR%

If you did not expect this message, you can ignore it.
verifyEmbedInstructions:
Click the button below to start the verification process. You will receive a code via email.

Already have a code? Use the **Enter Code** button.
verifyDmDescription: Welcome to **%VAR%**! Click the button below to verify your email address and gain access to the server.
verifyDmAdminWarning: Note: The server admin can see the email address you use
emailModalHeader:
## Verify Your Identity
Enter your email address below to receive a verification code.
emailModalAdminWarning: ⚠️ **Note:** The server admin can see the email address you use.
emailModalAcceptedDomains: 📋 **You must use an email from one of these domains:**
codeModalHeader:
## Almost There!
Check your inbox for the 6-digit verification code.
codePromptDescription:
A verification code has been sent to:
`%VAR%`

Click the button below to enter your code.
codePromptTipValue: Check your spam/junk folder. The email may take a few minutes to arrive.
mailInvalidDescription:
The email address you entered is not valid.

Please make sure:
• The email has the correct format (name@domain.com)
• You're using an allowed email domain
• There are no spaces in the address
verificationSuccessDescription:
Welcome! You have been successfully verified.

**Role assigned:** %VAR%
**Server:** %VAR%

You now have full access to the server.
invalidCodeDescription:
The code you entered is incorrect.

**What to do:**
• Double-check the 6-digit code from your email
• Make sure you're using the most recent code
• Request a new code if needed by clicking the verification button again
errorGenericDescription: Something went wrong while processing your request. The server administrator has been notified and will look into it.
errorNotifyChannelFailed: The configured error channel no longer exists or the bot cannot send messages there. Error was sent to you (the owner) instead. Please reconfigure using `/set_error_notify`.
errorNotifyUserFailed: The configured error notification user is no longer in the server or has DMs disabled. Error was sent to you (the owner) instead. Please reconfigure using `/set_error_notify`.
errorNotifySetOwner: ✅ Error notifications will now be sent to the server owner via DM.
errorNotifySetChannel: ✅ Error notifications will now be sent to #%VAR%.
errorNotifySetUser: ✅ Error notifications will now be sent to %VAR% via DM.
errorNotifyInvalidChannel: ❌ Please select a text channel for error notifications.
errorNotifyUserNotInGuild: ❌ The selected user is not a member of this server.
errorNotifyStatusOwner: Error notifications are sent to the **server owner** (%VAR%) via DM.
errorNotifyStatusChannelInvalid: ⚠️ Error notifications are configured for a channel that no longer exists. Notifications will fall back to the server owner.
errorNotifyStatusUser: Error notifications are sent to **%VAR%** via DM.
errorNotifyStatusUserInvalid: ⚠️ Error notifications are configured for a user who is no longer in the server. Notifications will fall back to the server owner.
errorNotifyStatusNoteValue: If no error channel is set, notifications fall back to the log channel. The server owner receives DMs by default unless they run `/set_error_notify me off`. Any admin can subscribe themselves with `/set_error_notify me on`.
errorRoleAssignMessage:
Failed to assign the verified/unverified role to a user. Please ensure:
• The bot's role is higher than the verified/unverified roles
• The roles still exist
• The bot has 'Manage Roles' permission

💡 **Tip:** Either move the EmailBot role above the verified/unverified roles in Server Settings → Roles, or assign the verified/unverified role to the bot directly.
[See example](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lkaesberg/EmailBot/main/images/bothierarchy.png)
errorBotNotConfiguredMessage:
A user tried to verify but the bot is not properly configured.

**Required:**
• Set default roles with `/role add` or domain-specific roles with `/domainrole add`

**Optional:**
• Restrict verification to specific email domains with `/domain add` (default: any email is accepted)
• Restrict verification to a specific list of addresses with `/emaillist upload`

Run `/status` to check the current configuration.
emaillistInvalidFile:
❌ **Invalid file type.**

Please upload a `.csv` or `.txt` file with one email address per row.
emaillistFileTooLarge:
❌ **File too large.**

The file must be smaller than 1MB.
emaillistNoValidEmails:
❌ **No valid email addresses found in the file.**

Make sure the file contains one email address per row (e.g. `user@example.com`).
emaillistUploaded:
✅ **Email list updated!**

Added **%VAR%** new address(es). Total now: **%VAR%**. Existing entries are kept — re-uploading the same file is safe (duplicates are skipped).
emaillistUploadError:
❌ **Failed to process the file.**

Please make sure the file is a valid CSV/text file and try again.
emailModalAllowedEmails: 📋 Additionally, **%VAR%** specific email addresses are allowed.
premiumMailLimitDescription:
This server has reached its monthly verification limit. **The server administrators have been notified** and need to enable additional capacity before new users can verify.

If this persists, please reach out to a server admin — there's nothing you need to do yourself, and no purchase is required from you.
premiumCsvRequiredDescription:
CSV import and export features require a premium plan.

**How to unlock:**
• Subscribe to the **Pro** plan (includes CSV + unlimited mails)
• Purchase a one-time **CSV unlock**

Use `/premium status` to check your plan.
premiumStatusFooter: Subscribe or purchase credits to unlock more features
premiumMobileHint: 📱 On mobile? Premium buttons only work on desktop/browser — [open the store in your browser](%VAR%) to purchase.
premiumNotEnabled: Monetization is not enabled on this bot instance.
premiumNoRedeemable:
No unredeemed purchases found.

If you bought credits or a CSV unlock, make sure:
• You're running `/premium redeem` in the **server** where you want the purchase applied (purchases are per-server, not global)
• You used the **same Discord account** that made the purchase
• The purchase has finished processing (try again in 1-2 minutes)
premiumFetchFailed: Failed to fetch your purchases from Discord.
premiumRedeemInstructions: Bought credits or a CSV unlock? Run `/premium redeem` **in this server** to apply your purchase. Purchases are stored per-server and cannot be moved between servers afterwards.
premiumRedeemHint: 💡 Already bought credits or a CSV unlock? Run `/premium redeem` here in this server to apply them.
premiumRedeemMultiGuildWarning: These benefits are now bound to **%VAR%** and cannot be transferred to another server.
quotaWarn80Message: This server has used **%VAR%** of its **%VAR%** monthly free verification emails. You can keep going - this is just a heads-up. Consider subscribing or buying credits before the limit is reached.
quotaWarn95Message: This server has used **%VAR%** of its **%VAR%** monthly free verification emails. You're about to run out. Subscribe for unlimited verifications or buy a credit pack to avoid interruption.
quotaWarn100Message: This server has used all **%VAR%** of its monthly free verification emails. Further sends will use bonus credits if available, or be denied. New users will not be able to verify until you subscribe, buy credits, or the quota resets next month.
quotaWarnCreditsLowMessage: Only **%VAR%** bonus credits remain on this server. Once they're used up, verifications will stop until you subscribe or buy more credits.
quotaWarnCreditsZeroMessage: All bonus credits on this server have been used. New verifications will be denied until you subscribe or buy more credits.
quotaWarnFooterHint: Use `/premium status` for details, or pick an option below.
quotaWarnFooterWebsite: See %VAR% for full instructions on subscribing and using credit packs.
premiumMailsZeptoMode: ZeptoMail mode — **%VAR%** credits remaining (1 credit per send)
mailModeZeptoUnavailable: ⚠️ ZeptoMail is not configured on this bot instance, so the zeptomail mode can't be enabled. Please contact the bot operator.
mailModeZeptoNoCreditsDescription:
You can't switch to **zeptomail** mode with 0 bonus credits — every verification needs at least 1 credit and the mode would auto-disable on the next attempt.

**What to do:**
• Buy a credit pack and run `/premium redeem`
• Run `/settings mail-mode mode:zeptomail` again once credits are available
mailModeSetFreeDescription: Verifications now use the **free self-SMTP** path with **%VAR%** sends per month. Bonus credits are still used as overflow once the free quota is exhausted.
mailModeSetZeptoDescription:
All verifications now go through **ZeptoMail** and consume **1 credit each**. The free monthly quota is **not** used while this mode is active.

**Credits available:** %VAR%

When credits reach 0, this server is automatically switched back to the free mode and the owner is notified.
zeptoModeAutoDisabledMessage:
Your server ran out of bonus credits while in **zeptomail** mode, so it has been switched back to the **free** mail mode. New verifications will use the free monthly quota and the self-SMTP path again.

Buy more credits and run `/settings mail-mode mode:zeptomail` to re-enable ZeptoMail delivery, or stay on free if it covers your monthly volume.
errorNotifySetChannelWithPing: ✅ Error notifications will now be sent to #%VAR% (ping: %VAR%).
errorNotifyChannelCleared: ✅ Error channel cleared. Notifications will fall back to the log channel (if configured) and DM subscribers.
errorNotifyMeOn: ✅ You will now receive error notification DMs for this server.
errorNotifyMeOff: ✅ You will no longer receive error notification DMs for this server.
errorNotifyStatusChannelMissing: ⚠️ Error channel: configured but no longer exists.
errorNotifyStatusChannelNone: 📤 Error channel: *not set* — admins receive DMs only.
statusErrorNotifyChannelMissing: ⚠️ Configured error channel no longer exists.
statusErrorNotifyChannelNone: 📤 No error channel — DM subscribers only.
statusIssueNoRoles: No verified roles configured (use `/role add` or `/domainrole add`)
emailStyleSpamWarning:
**Styled (HTML) verification emails** look nicer, but mail providers (Gmail, Outlook, etc.) often classify them as marketing or spam. **Plain text** emails are the default because they have noticeably better deliverability.

If users start reporting that they don't receive verification codes, switch back to plain.

To confirm and switch to HTML, run:
`/settings email-style style:styled confirm:True`
emailStyleSetStyledDescription: Verification emails for this server will now be sent in HTML format. If deliverability drops, switch back with `/settings email-style style:plain`.
emailStyleSetPlainTitle: ✅ Email style set to plain text
emailStyleSetPlainDescription: Verification emails for this server will now be sent as plain text - the most reliable for deliverability.
emailHtmlServerIntro: This message was generated by EmailVerify for the Discord server:
emailHtmlCodeIntro: To continue, enter the following value in Discord:
emailHtmlIgnoreNote: If you did not request this message, you can ignore it.
statusDomainsOnlyAllowedList: *None — only the uploaded allowed-emails list is accepted*
domainClearAcceptAll: ℹ️ With no domains and no allowed-emails list, **all email addresses are now accepted** (subject to the blacklist). Add domains with `/domain add` to restrict verification.
domainClearStillRestricted: ℹ️ Verification is still restricted to your uploaded allowed-emails list.
premiumAdStandard: ⭐ **Standard subscription** — Unlimited verification emails per month + premium delivery via Zoho ZeptoMail (EU servers, much better inbox placement than the free tier).
premiumAdPro: 💎 **Pro subscription** — Everything in Standard, plus CSV import & export of allowed-email lists and verification logs.
premiumAdCsvUnlock: 📁 **CSV unlock** *(one-time)* — Get the Pro plan's CSV features for this server without committing to a subscription.
premiumAdCreditPacks: 🎟️ **Credit packs** *(one-time)* — Top up extra verifications: 100, 500, or 2,000. They never expire and roll over month to month. Used after your free 25 are gone.
premiumAdFooter: Click a button below to see prices and buy. Purchases apply to this server only. Run /premium redeem after buying credits or the CSV unlock.
emaillistLockedUserMessage: Verification is paused on this server while the admins resolve a configuration issue. They've been notified — please try again later.
emaillistLockedAdminTitle: 🛑 Allowed-emails list is locked — verification paused
emaillistLockedAdminMessage:
This server has an uploaded allowed-emails list, but the **Pro subscription** or **CSV unlock** required to manage it is no longer active. Verification is paused for everyone until you choose one of the following:

• **Clear the list:** run `/emaillist clear`. After that, any email is accepted (subject to your `/domain` and `/blacklist` settings).
• **Restore CSV access:** open `/premium status` and re-buy the **Pro** plan or the **CSV unlock**. The existing list will continue to work as soon as access is restored.

This notification is throttled to once per hour so we don't flood the channel.
unverifiedByOtherDm: You were unverified on **%VAR%** because someone else verified with that email address.
sessionExpiredDescription:
Your verification session has expired or wasn't started properly.

**How to fix:**
1. Go back to the server's verification channel
2. Click the verification button to start fresh
3. Enter your email to receive a new code
sessionExpiredDescriptionShort:
Your verification session has expired or wasn't started properly.

**How to fix:**
1. Go back to the server's verification channel
2. Click the verification button to start fresh
codeExpiredDescription:
Your verification code has expired or was already used.

Please start the verification again to receive a new code.
codeTooManyAttemptsDescription:
You've entered an incorrect code too many times.

Please start the verification again to receive a new code.
resendCooldownDescription:
Please wait **%VAR% seconds** before requesting another code.

Don't forget to check your spam folder — the last code may already be there.
mailDeniedWarnMessage:
**%VAR%** verification attempt(s) were blocked this month because this server's email limit was reached. Every one of them is a member who tried to join but couldn't verify.

Subscribe for unlimited verifications or buy a credit pack below to let them in.
premiumForecastRunOut: 📈 At the current pace, the free monthly emails will run out around %VAR%.
premiumBlockedThisMonth: 🚫 **%VAR%** verification attempt(s) blocked by the mail limit this month
statusIssueNoErrorDestination: Quota & error warnings have no destination — set a channel with `/set_error_notify channel` or a log channel, or important alerts will be missed
quotaWarnRedeemHint: After buying credits, run `/premium redeem` in this server to apply them — credits never expire.
